steps.title: Fastest path: use the function table
steps.content: Enter the function in Desmos or a calculator table, then plug in the requested input. The output is $\frac{83}{9}$, so the answer is C, $\frac{83}{9}$. This is just a one-row lookup, and the arithmetic below confirms the table value.

steps.title: Substitute x = 18 and simplify the first term
steps.content:
Substitute $x = 18$ into $g(x) = \frac{5}{9}x - \frac{7}{9}$:
$$g(18) = \frac{5}{9}(18) - \frac{7}{9}$$
Simplify the first term: $\frac{5}{9} \cdot 18 = \frac{90}{9} = 10$. Therefore:
$$g(18) = 10 - \frac{7}{9}$$

steps.title: Convert to a common denominator and subtract
steps.content:
Express 10 as ninths: $10 = \frac{90}{9}$. Subtract the fractions:
$$g(18) = \frac{90}{9} - \frac{7}{9} = \frac{83}{9}$$
That is the correct answer.
